repo_prior_art.cite: eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1: quotient row-space IF frontier, Gamma_m(pi,Sigma,a) tau=0 iff BJS and SA/CS/W are IF-equivalent

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The kernel duplicates eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1's quotient row-space IF frontier; replacing Gamma_m by C_m is not repo-novel.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 2
novelty_flags.one_line: The strict variance-gap claim is the same quotient-norm gap already proposed in eid_bjs_efficient_event_study_v1.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The checklist omits closer efficiency/EIF comparators, especially Roth-Sant'Anna 2023 on efficient staggered rollout designs and Chen-Sant'Anna-Xie 2025 on closed-form EIFs for DiD/event-study parameters.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The flagship frontier relies on bare SA/CS/W/BJS citations in the results-at-glance gap; it needs section/equation/page anchors to the exact missing IF-equivalence claim.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 1
novelty_flags.one_line: The constructive object C(pi,Sigma,G,T,a) is not computed from published BJS/SA/CS/W score primitives in Exhibit 9.1; the exhibit declares the 3x3 matrix instead of deriving it.

novelty_flags.label: Conjecture 3
novelty_flags.one_line: Wooldridge 2023 is a nonlinear DID/imputation-versus-pooled-QMLE equivalence comparator; the proposal's 'cohort-time saturated TWFE residual projection loss' framing is not accurately anchored to that paper.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: C is defined as the quotient loading mapping tau into the IF-projection difference, so 'IF equality iff C*tau=0' is largely a definitional unfold unless C receives an independent primitive characterization.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 2
soundness_flags.one_line: C_m is already defined as Omega_m^{1/2} Q_m, but the variance formula uses ||C_m tau||_{Omega_m}^2, apparently double-weighting by Omega_m; it should specify either ||Q_m tau||_{Omega_m}^2 or Euclidean ||C_m tau||^2.

soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 3
soundness_flags.one_line: Under the displayed quotient form psi_m = psi_BJS + q_m(R)'tau, the map P_BJS(psi_m)=psi_m-q_m(R)'tau recovers psi_BJS for every m, not iff C_m*tau=0.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Replace the tautological C definition with an independent formula from the published estimator score equations, including the actual SA, CS, W, and BJS loading matrices.
Rebuild Exhibit 9.1 so the 3x3 contrast matrix is derived row-by-row from the residualized comparison incidences, not asserted.
Fix the variance metric by choosing one normalization convention for Q_m, C_m, and Omega_m, then rerun the homogeneous-effect and no-quotient sanity reductions.
Add Roth-Sant'Anna efficient rollout and Chen-Sant'Anna-Xie EIF papers to the related-work checklist, with section-level anchors explaining why they do not subsume the frontier.

recommended_next_step: Do not advance this version; either pivot away from the already-banked BJS frontier or redraft with an independently computed C object and a corrected projection-map statement.
